description:
Vehicle speed estimations of the road network of the wider urban area of Thessaloniki (Greece) produced using Floating Car Data (FCD). Includes real-time as well as historical data.

Εκτιμήσεις ταχύτητας κίνησης οχημάτων στο οδικό δίκτυο της ευρύτερης αστικής περιοχής της Θεσσαλονίκης (Ελλάδα) χρησιμοποιώντας δεδομένα από οχήματα εν κινήσει (FCD). Περιλαμβάνονται δεδομένα πραγματικού χρόνου, καθώς και ιστορικά δεδομένα.
name: nap-rdf-vehicle-speed-of-the-road-network-of-thessaloniki

resources.description:
An HTTP call to this resource returns only the first 500 available records, since paging is performed with a default setting of 500 records.

To get the next 500 records, please append the following string in your GET request:
?offset=500&limit=500

For the next 500 records, append accordingly:
?offset=1000&limit=500

Similarly, for more records.

Available fields include: "Link_id", "Link_Direction", "Timestamp", and "Speed".

It should be noted that the values of the "Link_id" field are compatible with OSM objects.
resources.name: vehicle-speed-real-time-json
resources.title: Vehicle Speed (Real-time / JSON)

resources.description:
A new dataset is added at the end of each month. The covered time period starts on the 1st of January 2017.

Additional information: 7zipped tab-delimited text file.

Available fields include: "Link_id", "Link_Direction", "Timestamp", and "Speed".

It should be noted that the values of the "Link_id" field are compatible with OSM objects.
resources.name: vehicle-speed-historical-txt
resources.title: Vehicle Speed (Historical / TXT)
